Appearance

DSO DocumentationNative secrets for Docker — without Kubernetes

Securely inject cloud secrets into Docker Compose at runtime

Get Started
What is DSO?
🔒

Secret Isolation

All secret values are held in-memory and injected via Unix socket. Zero persistence to disk by design.

🛠️

Unified Configuration

One standard YAML format for AWS, Azure, HashiCorp Vault, and Local File providers.

🔄

Smart Rotation

Hot-reload secrets without restarting your services. Atomic updates ensure zero downtime.
